sentences.arabic: تَحْرِصُ مَنَالٌ عَلَى شُرْبِ الْحَلِيبِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Manal vodi brigu da svaki dan pije mlijeko.
sentences.translationEn: Manal makes sure to drink milk every day.

sentences.arabic: تَعْلَمُ أَنَّ الْحَلِيبَ يُقَوِّي الْعِظَامَ وَالْأَسْنَانَ.
sentences.translation: Zna da mlijeko jača kosti i zube.
sentences.translationEn: She knows that milk strengthens bones and teeth.
She drinks it in the morning with breakfast.

sentences.arabic: أَحْيَانًا تُضِيفُ إِلَيْهِ قَلِيلًا مِنَ الْعَسَلِ.
sentences.translation: Ponekad dodaje malo meda u njega.
sentences.translationEn: Sometimes she adds a little honey to it.
